---
title: "Compute Time Benchmark Harness"
params:
  device: "gpu"                 # cpu | gpu
  benchmark_tag: "gpu_default"
  scenario_set: "quick"         # quick | extended
  request_file: null            # optional saved estimator request JSON under cache/computetimetest/requests
  request_mode: "append"        # append | request_only
  cache_version: "v1"
  analysis_start_utc_iso: "2024-07-01T00:00:00+00:00"
  analysis_end_utc_iso: "2024-09-30T23:00:00+00:00"
  assumed_local_timezone: "America/New_York"
  missing_fraction: 0.20
  mask_seed: 531
  global_seed: 531
  covariate_mode: "none"
  force_recompute: false
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
format:
  pdf:
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        \usepackage{fullpage}
number-sections: true
---

## Purpose

This document runs a small, curated set of GPU timing benchmarks on the CSV-only pipeline. The benchmark harness is inference-focused: it measures panel search / fitting time and skips the post-fit reconstruction path used only for downstream plots and held-out benchmark tables. It writes raw timing rows and a calibrated runtime table under `cache/computetimetest/...`, then renders compact summaries of what was measured.

```{python}
#| tags: [parameters]

device = "gpu"
benchmark_tag = "gpu_default"
scenario_set = "quick"
request_file = None
request_mode = "append"
cache_version = "v1"
analysis_start_utc_iso = "2024-07-01T00:00:00+00:00"
analysis_end_utc_iso = "2024-09-30T23:00:00+00:00"
assumed_local_timezone = "America/New_York"
missing_fraction = 0.20
mask_seed = 531
global_seed = 531
covariate_mode = "none"
force_recompute = False
```

```{python}
#| label: benchmark-interface

import json
import os
import sys
from pathlib import Path

import pandas as pd
import yaml
from IPython.display import display


PROJECT_ROOT = Path.cwd().resolve()
APP_CODE_ROOT = PROJECT_ROOT.parent / "eda"

if str(PROJECT_ROOT) not in sys.path:
    sys.path.insert(0, str(PROJECT_ROOT))
if str(APP_CODE_ROOT) not in sys.path:
    sys.path.insert(0, str(APP_CODE_ROOT))

from src.ihs_eda.step_pomp import load_runtime_estimate_request, resolve_benchmark_request_path


def _raw_params() -> dict:
    parameter_keys = [
        "device",
        "benchmark_tag",
        "scenario_set",
        "request_file",
        "request_mode",
        "cache_version",
        "analysis_start_utc_iso",
        "analysis_end_utc_iso",
        "assumed_local_timezone",
        "missing_fraction",
        "mask_seed",
        "global_seed",
        "covariate_mode",
        "force_recompute",
    ]
    injected = {key: globals()[key] for key in parameter_keys if key in globals()}
    if injected:
        return injected
    try:
        raw = dict(params)
        if raw:
            return raw
    except Exception:
        pass
    qmd_path = PROJECT_ROOT / "computetimetest.qmd"
    text = qmd_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
    if not text.startswith("---"):
        return {}
    end_idx = text.find("\n---", 4)
    if end_idx < 0:
        return {}
    frontmatter = yaml.safe_load(text[4:end_idx]) or {}
    params_block = frontmatter.get("params", {})
    return dict(params_block) if isinstance(params_block, dict) else {}


def _resolve_params(raw: dict[str, object]) -> dict[str, object]:
    def _as_bool(value: object) -> bool:
        if isinstance(value, bool):
            return value
        if isinstance(value, str):
            return value.strip().lower() in {"1", "true", "yes", "y", "on"}
        return bool(value)

    resolved = dict(raw)
    resolved["device"] = str(resolved.get("device", "gpu")).strip().lower()
    resolved["benchmark_tag"] = str(resolved.get("benchmark_tag", "gpu_default")).strip()
    resolved["scenario_set"] = str(resolved.get("scenario_set", "quick")).strip().lower()
    resolved["cache_version"] = str(resolved.get("cache_version", "v1")).strip()
    request_file_value = resolved.get("request_file")
    resolved["request_file"] = None if request_file_value in {None, "", "null"} else str(request_file_value).strip()
    resolved["request_mode"] = str(resolved.get("request_mode", "append")).strip().lower()
    resolved["analysis_start_utc_iso"] = str(resolved.get("analysis_start_utc_iso"))
    resolved["analysis_end_utc_iso"] = str(resolved.get("analysis_end_utc_iso"))
    resolved["assumed_local_timezone"] = str(resolved.get("assumed_local_timezone", "America/New_York")).strip()
    resolved["missing_fraction"] = float(resolved.get("missing_fraction", 0.20))
    resolved["mask_seed"] = int(resolved.get("mask_seed", 531))
    resolved["global_seed"] = int(resolved.get("global_seed", 531))
    resolved["covariate_mode"] = str(resolved.get("covariate_mode", "none")).strip()
    resolved["force_recompute"] = _as_bool(resolved.get("force_recompute", False))
    return resolved


resolved_params = _resolve_params(_raw_params())
requested_device = resolved_params["device"]
os.environ["JAX_PLATFORMS"] = "cuda" if requested_device == "gpu" else "cpu"
imported_request_payload = None
if resolved_params["request_file"]:
    request_path = resolve_benchmark_request_path(PROJECT_ROOT, resolved_params["request_file"])
    imported_request_payload = load_runtime_estimate_request(request_path)

CSV_PATH = PROJECT_ROOT / "FitbitHourly.csv"
if not CSV_PATH.exists():
    raise FileNotFoundError("FitbitHourly.csv must be in the same folder as computetimetest.qmd.")


def _display_table(df: pd.DataFrame, *, precision: int = 3) -> None:
    display(df.style.hide(axis="index").format(precision=precision, na_rep=""))


settings_table = pd.DataFrame(
    [{"Setting": key, "Value": value} for key, value in resolved_params.items()]
)
_display_table(settings_table, precision=4)
if imported_request_payload is not None:
    request_settings = imported_request_payload.get("request", {})
    imported_request_table = pd.DataFrame(
        [
            {"Setting": "request_hash", "Value": imported_request_payload.get("request_hash")},
            {"Setting": "label", "Value": imported_request_payload.get("label")},
            {"Setting": "model_families", "Value": ", ".join(request_settings.get("model_families", []))},
            {"Setting": "pooling_modes", "Value": ", ".join(request_settings.get("pooling_modes", []))},
            {"Setting": "participant_count", "Value": request_settings.get("participant_count")},
            {"Setting": "participants_per_batch", "Value": request_settings.get("participants_per_batch")},
            {"Setting": "fit_scope", "Value": request_settings.get("fit_scope")},
            {"Setting": "masking_replicates", "Value": request_settings.get("masking_replicates")},
            {"Setting": "window_days", "Value": request_settings.get("window_days")},
        ]
    )
    _display_table(imported_request_table, precision=4)
```

```{python}
#| label: benchmark-run

import jax

from helpers.computetimetest_benchmarks import run_timing_benchmark_suite


backend = str(jax.default_backend())
devices = [device.platform for device in jax.devices()]
if requested_device == "gpu":
    if backend != "gpu" or "gpu" not in devices:
        raise RuntimeError(
            "device='gpu' was requested, but JAX did not initialize a GPU backend. "
            f"default_backend={backend!r}, devices={devices!r}"
        )
elif backend != "cpu":
    raise RuntimeError(
        "device='cpu' was requested, but JAX initialized a different backend. "
        f"default_backend={backend!r}"
    )


def _progress(message: str) -> None:
    print(message, flush=True)


benchmark_result = run_timing_benchmark_suite(
    CSV_PATH,
    project_root=PROJECT_ROOT,
    benchmark_tag=resolved_params["benchmark_tag"],
    scenario_set=resolved_params["scenario_set"],
    device=requested_device,
    cache_version=resolved_params["cache_version"],
    analysis_start_utc_iso=resolved_params["analysis_start_utc_iso"],
    analysis_end_utc_iso=resolved_params["analysis_end_utc_iso"],
    assumed_local_timezone=resolved_params["assumed_local_timezone"],
    missing_fraction=resolved_params["missing_fraction"],
    mask_seed=resolved_params["mask_seed"],
    global_seed=resolved_params["global_seed"],
    covariate_mode=resolved_params["covariate_mode"],
    force_recompute=resolved_params["force_recompute"],
    request_payload=imported_request_payload,
    request_mode=resolved_params["request_mode"],
    inference_only=True,
    progress_callback=_progress,
)

manifest = benchmark_result["manifest"]
raw_timings = benchmark_result["raw_timings"]
calibration = benchmark_result["calibration"]
scenario_summary = benchmark_result["scenario_summary"]
request_validation = benchmark_result["request_validation"]

run_info = pd.DataFrame(
    [
        {
            "run_dir": str(benchmark_result["run_dir"]),
            "raw_timings_path": manifest["raw_timings_path"],
            "calibration_path": manifest["calibration_path"],
            "scenario_summary_path": manifest["scenario_summary_path"],
            "device": manifest["device"],
            "jax_backend": manifest["jax_backend"],
            "n_scenarios": manifest["n_scenarios"],
            "n_rows": manifest["n_rows"],
        }
    ]
)
```

## Run Output

```{python}
#| label: benchmark-run-output

_display_table(run_info)
```

## Scenario Timings

```{python}
#| label: benchmark-scenarios

scenario_display = scenario_summary.copy()
if not scenario_display.empty:
    scenario_display["inference_seconds"] = pd.to_numeric(scenario_display["inference_fit_seconds"], errors="coerce")
    scenario_display["benchmark_harness_seconds"] = pd.to_numeric(scenario_display["full_wall_seconds"], errors="coerce")
    scenario_display["auxiliary_seconds"] = pd.to_numeric(scenario_display["auxiliary_artifact_seconds"], errors="coerce")
    scenario_display["search_seconds"] = pd.to_numeric(scenario_display["panel_global_search_seconds"], errors="coerce")
    scenario_display["postfit_seconds"] = pd.to_numeric(scenario_display["postfit_filter_total_seconds"], errors="coerce")
    scenario_display["postfit_fit_seconds"] = pd.to_numeric(scenario_display["postfit_fit_seconds"], errors="coerce")
    scenario_display["postfit_host_seconds"] = pd.to_numeric(scenario_display["postfit_host_overhead_seconds"], errors="coerce")
    scenario_display["fit_unattributed_seconds"] = pd.to_numeric(scenario_display["fit_unattributed_seconds"], errors="coerce")
    scenario_display["prep_seconds"] = pd.to_numeric(scenario_display["data_prep_seconds"], errors="coerce")
    scenario_display = scenario_display[
        [
            "scenario_id",
            "model_family",
            "pooling_mode",
            "fit_mode",
            "participant_count",
            "panel_batch_size",
            "stage_profile",
            "inference_seconds",
            "benchmark_harness_seconds",
            "auxiliary_seconds",
            "search_seconds",
            "postfit_seconds",
            "postfit_fit_seconds",
            "postfit_host_seconds",
            "fit_unattributed_seconds",
            "prep_seconds",
            "mask_build_seconds",
            "benchmark_build_seconds",
            "warm_start_used",
        ]
    ]
_display_table(scenario_display, precision=3)
```

## Calibration Summary

```{python}
#| label: benchmark-calibration

calibration_display = calibration.copy()
if not calibration_display.empty:
    calibration_display = calibration_display[
        [
            "model_family",
            "pooling_mode",
            "fit_mode",
            "n_runs",
            "inference_fit_seconds_median",
            "full_wall_seconds_median",
            "auxiliary_artifact_seconds_median",
            "search_seconds_per_batch_hour_unit_median",
            "postfit_seconds_per_hour_eval_unit_median",
            "data_prep_seconds_per_participant_hour_median",
            "mask_build_seconds_per_participant_hour_median",
            "benchmark_seconds_per_participant_hour_median",
            "arma_seconds_per_participant_hour_median",
        ]
    ]
_display_table(calibration_display, precision=6)
```

## Imported Request Validation

```{python}
#| label: benchmark-request-validation

if request_validation.empty:
    print("No imported estimator request was validated in this run.")
else:
    validation_display = request_validation.copy()
    _display_table(validation_display, precision=4)
```

## Raw Timing Rows

```{python}
#| label: benchmark-raw

raw_display = raw_timings.copy()
if not raw_display.empty:
    raw_display = raw_display[
        [
            "scenario_id",
            "model_family",
            "pooling_mode",
            "fit_mode",
            "participant_count",
            "panel_batch_size",
            "batch_count",
            "hours_per_participant",
            "search_work_units",
            "inference_fit_seconds",
            "full_wall_seconds",
            "auxiliary_artifact_seconds",
            "panel_global_search_seconds",
            "postfit_filter_total_seconds",
            "data_prep_seconds",
            "mask_build_seconds",
            "benchmark_build_seconds",
            "fit_total_seconds",
        ]
    ]
_display_table(raw_display, precision=4)
```
